ad_name: Asiakastarina: Tuntuvat paremmilta kuin 500€ lasit — Naiset 45-54

structure.note: Short punchy customer testimonial. Talking head as main, B-roll cuts match each sentence. Every B-roll shows the actual Banaani product from reference images. Uses Kling O3 dual-frame for smooth transitions. RULE: start and end frames show the SAME scene — only camera angle/distance changes.

avatar_prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a Finnish/Nordic woman, age 50, natural light blonde shoulder-length hair typical Scandinavian style, wearing a soft cream-white knit sweater. Warm genuine smile showing slight surprise, kind light blue Nordic eyes, fair skin with natural freckles. Soft natural daylight from a kitchen window in a cozy Finnish home. Shallow depth of field, creamy warm bokeh. Shot on professional camera, detailed skin texture, minimal natural makeup. Upper body framing, looking directly at camera. 9:16 vertical portrait orientation. High-end lifestyle photography.

talking_head.full_script: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista. Sit mä löysin Banaanin. Kahdet lasit, yheksällä kympillä. Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit. Ja näiden Hinta-laatusuhde on loistava. Kokeile itekin, banaanieyewear.fi.

script_breakdown.line: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista.
Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit.

broll_clips.visual_story: Expensive optician display — conveys the 500€ pain point
broll_clips.camera_movement: Slow zoom in from wide to medium
broll_clips.start_image_prompt: Wide shot of a bright sterile optician store interior. Rows of premium eyeglasses displayed behind glass shelves, cold clinical white fluorescent lighting. Polished glass counters, minimalist luxury retail atmosphere. Shot from entrance perspective showing the full expensive-feeling space. No people. Phone camera style. No text, no writing, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.end_image_prompt: Medium shot of the same bright sterile optician store interior, same glass shelves with premium eyeglasses, same cold clinical white fluorescent lighting, same polished glass counters. Camera has moved closer into the store, showing fewer shelves but more detail on the displayed glasses. Same minimalist luxury retail atmosphere. No people. Phone camera style. No text, no writing, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Slow steady camera push forward into the optician store, fluorescent light reflections on glass surfaces, cold sterile atmosphere

broll_clips.visual_story: Banaani package arrived — the discovery moment
broll_clips.camera_movement: Gentle overhead drift closer to the open package
broll_clips.start_image_prompt: Overhead top-down view of an open small brown cardboard shipping box on a light wooden kitchen table, with a glasses case and product visible inside. Warm morning sunlight streaming from a window. Cozy Nordic Scandinavian home interior with white walls. The table also has a cup of coffee nearby. Wide composition showing the full table scene. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no writing, no logos, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.end_image_prompt: Same overhead top-down view of the same open small brown cardboard shipping box on the same light wooden kitchen table, but camera is now closer, filling more of the frame with the box and the glasses case inside. Same warm morning sunlight from the same window. Same cozy Nordic home, same cup of coffee at the edge of frame. Tighter composition focusing on the unboxing contents. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no writing, no logos, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Gentle overhead camera drifts closer to the open package, warm natural light, cozy anticipation feeling

broll_clips.visual_story: Two pairs of glasses laid out beautifully — the value proposition
broll_clips.camera_movement: Slow overhead zoom from wide to closer on both pairs
broll_clips.start_image_prompt: Overhead flat-lay of two pairs of eyeglasses matching the reference photos, laid next to each other on a soft white linen cloth. Natural warm morning window light from the right. Clean minimalist flat-lay composition with space around the glasses. Warm cozy tones. Top-down overhead angle showing both pairs clearly. Phone camera product photography style. No people. No text, no writing, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.end_image_prompt: Same overhead flat-lay of the same two pairs of eyeglasses on the same soft white linen cloth, but camera has moved closer. Both pairs fill more of the frame, showing more detail of the frames and lenses. Same natural warm morning window light from the right. Same clean minimalist composition, same warm cozy tones, same top-down overhead angle. Phone camera product photography style. No people. No text, no writing, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Smooth overhead camera zoom closer to both pairs of glasses, morning light playing across the lenses and frames

broll_clips.visual_story: Beautiful product shot showing quality — these feel premium
broll_clips.camera_movement: Slow orbit from side angle to front angle
broll_clips.start_image_prompt: Side-angle beauty shot of the exact eyeglasses from the reference photo, unfolded and open, resting on a warm wooden surface. Soft natural daylight creating gentle shadows on the left side. Shallow depth of field with warm creamy bokeh background. The glasses are photographed from a 45-degree side angle showing the temple arm and frame profile. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.end_image_prompt: Front-angle beauty shot of the same exact eyeglasses from the reference photo on the same warm wooden surface. Same soft natural daylight, same gentle shadows, same shallow depth of field with warm creamy bokeh background. Camera has now moved to face the glasses from the front, showing the full frame shape and both lenses. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Smooth slow camera orbit from side view to front view of the glasses, warm light continuously playing across the frame, cinematic product showcase

broll_clips.visual_story: Craftsmanship close-up — quality details justify the value
broll_clips.camera_movement: Zoom from medium product shot to extreme close-up of hinge details
broll_clips.start_image_prompt: Medium close-up of the exact eyeglasses from the reference photo held at a slight angle against a clean blurred background. Warm natural side light from the left catching the frame surface. The full frame of the glasses is visible with both temples extended. Beautiful product photography with professional lighting. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.end_image_prompt: Extreme macro close-up of the hinge area of the same exact eyeglasses from the reference photo. Same warm natural side light from the left catching the metal elements and frame finish. The hinge mechanism and frame texture fill the frame, showing premium craftsmanship and quality materials. Same clean blurred background. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Camera smoothly zooms from the full glasses view deep into the hinge detail, warm side light continuously catching the metal craftsmanship

broll_clips.visual_story: Lifestyle scene — glasses in everyday cozy context
broll_clips.camera_movement: Gentle drift closer into the cozy reading scene
broll_clips.start_image_prompt: Lifestyle flat-lay: the exact eyeglasses from the reference photo placed on an open book page, next to a steaming cup of coffee on a cozy cream knit blanket. Small green plant in corner. Soft warm afternoon window light. Nordic hygge atmosphere. Wide composition showing the full cozy scene. Top-down overhead angle. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.end_image_prompt: Same lifestyle flat-lay: the same exact eyeglasses from the reference photo on the same open book page, same steaming coffee cup, same cozy cream knit blanket, same small green plant. Same soft warm afternoon window light, same Nordic hygge atmosphere. Camera has drifted closer, the glasses and book fill more of the frame. Same top-down overhead angle. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Gentle overhead camera drift closer into the cozy reading scene, warm ambient light, inviting lifestyle feeling

broll_clips.camera_movement: Slow zoom out revealing the full collection
broll_clips.start_image_prompt: Close-up overhead shot of three pairs of stylish eyeglasses from the reference photos arranged in a triangle pattern on a clean white marble surface. A small green succulent plant and a cup of coffee nearby. Bright clean morning window light. The camera is close, showing mainly the center pair with the other two at the edges of frame. Aspirational minimalist flat-lay. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no writing, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.end_image_prompt: Wider overhead shot of the same three pairs of stylish eyeglasses from the reference photos in the same triangle pattern on the same clean white marble surface. Same small green succulent plant and same cup of coffee. Same bright clean morning window light. Camera has pulled back to show all three pairs fully visible with elegant spacing between them. Same aspirational minimalist flat-lay composition. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no writing, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Camera smoothly pulls back from close-up to reveal all three pairs of glasses arranged beautifully, clean satisfying reveal ending
